sub_modules.harris_index_to_xy: Converts row-major output index to image x/y coordinates.
sub_modules.harris_sobel: Computes Sobel X and Y gradients from a 3x3 pixel stencil.
sub_modules.harris_grad_products: Computes Ix squared, Iy squared, and IxIy gradient products.
sub_modules.harris_gaussian3x3: Applies normalized 3x3 Gaussian smoothing with weights 1-2-1, 2-4-2, 1-2-1.
sub_modules.harris_threshold: Compares the Harris response against the configured threshold to produce the binary corner map.
